visual_findings: Page 4 previously exposed long inline backend identifiers in the Gate 2 Method paragraph, creating jagged monospaced line breaks.
The accepted render replaces those identifiers with model roles, leaving checkpoint identity to repository provenance records.
Results still starts on page 4 and Figure 2 remains stable on page 5 without caption collision.
The final page-4 Results opener now frames Figure 2 as orientation evidence rather than VLM-equivalence evidence.
change_summary: Replaced inline full Gemma4 and Qwen checkpoint identifiers in the main Method prose with canonical/diagnostic backend roles.
Changed the Gate 1 description from obvious visual structure to first-order visual structure.
Reworded the Results opener to state that Figure 2 is orientation evidence, not VLM-equivalence evidence.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

residual_risk: This is a focused p3-p5 method/results readability pass, not a complete final-upload audit or integrity-fingerprint refresh.
